title: Part 4. Workshop - Server Access with Teleport

resources.title: Rawkode Academy courses repository
resources.evidence_quote: You can go to the Rawkode Academy GitHub page that is github.com/rockwoodacademy. From there, you will see a courses repository and we have a directory for the Teleport Complete Guide.

resources.title: Teleport Linux get started guide
resources.evidence_quote: You can go to goteleport.com, click on doc docs, and we can just use the, get started guide, click on Linux.

resources.title: Teleport reference config file documentation
resources.evidence_quote: This is my favorite page in the docs. There we go. So if you're ever trying to work at what you can and cannot configure, what I normally do is go to set up reference config file, and this is everything the config file accepts with some documentation on it.

resources.title: Teleport enhanced session recording documentation
resources.evidence_quote: So we search for enhanced session recording, this changes the way that Teleport does session recording.
